summary: This video captures the Eid Al-Adha 2025 celebration at the Muslim Community Center of Tucson. The content includes extensive Takbir (magnification of Allah) recitations throughout the Eid prayer service, followed by a detailed sermon (khutbah) delivered by the imam. The sermon covers the significance of Eid Al-Adha, the story of Prophet Ibrahim and his son Ismail, the rulings regarding Eid prayer when it coincides with Friday prayer, and the conditions for valid sacrificial animals. The imam also emphasizes the importance of Takbir during the Eid days, explains the Takbir al-Tashreeq (restricted takbir), and concludes with supplications for Muslims worldwide, particularly for those suffering in Palestine.
